summary.zh: 合成科技趋势 Web Deck 样例已具备 source、Web Deck、封面截图和交付检查清单；重点证明公开来源、趋势叙事和 Web Deck 视觉节奏。
summary.en: Synthetic tech trend proof includes source, Web Deck, cover screenshot, and delivery checklist.

checks.summary: Source brief includes public references, signal interpretation, implications, and caveats.
Starter proof alternates thesis and evidence pages for public sharing.
Preset declares expected artifacts, review commands, and acceptance criteria.

repairRecommendations.zh: 默认先报告事实、解读和建议是否分离，以及公开来源是否足够清楚。
repairRecommendations.en: Report whether facts, interpretation, and recommendations stay separate with clear public sources.

repairRecommendations.zh: 只有用户明确要求自动修复时，才调整 Web Deck 页面节奏或 SVG 版式。
repairRecommendations.en: Only adjust Web Deck rhythm or SVG layout when explicitly requested.
